overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character in a red jacket with a biker patch walking around the exterior of the 'Double Barrel Bar' at night. The character moves from the back patio area with wooden barrels, along the side wall, around to the front parking lot with neon signage, and approaches the entrance door.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior side patio of wooden bar building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side wall of the bar past wooden barrels and storage items

entered.detail: large wooden storage barrel near the back corner of the building
wooden picnic table with bottles on it
bright rectangular light fixture mounted on the building wall
locked door with sign on the side of the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the narrow side passage of a wooden bar building at night. Wooden barrels and a picnic table sit near the back corner while a bright wall-mounted light illuminates the path. The ground is dirt with sparse grass, and the side windows glow with warm interior light.

scene_state.functional_zone: front parking lot of roadside bar with neon signage

events.description: turns corner from narrow side passage to open front parking lot revealing neon beer sign and parked vehicles
ambient lighting increases with bright red neon beer sign illumination

agents.ego_description: walking along the front facade of the bar observing the neon signage and passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading BEER mounted on the building corner
painted text DOUBLE BARREL BAR on the wooden wall
dark colored classic muscle car parked in front of the bar
white delivery van parked behind the muscle car

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide parking lot as the character rounds the corner. A bright red neon BEER sign illuminates the area, revealing the painted DOUBLE BARREL BAR signage on the wooden facade. Several vehicles including a dark muscle car and white van are parked along the front, while distant city lights twinkle in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar entrance area with service door

events.description: slows walking pace and stops at the entrance door

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the front entrance door of the bar

entered.detail: front entrance door with light above it
sign reading COLD BEVERAGES in red and white
window with purple and green interior lighting next to the door

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the parked vehicles toward the bar entrance. The COLD BEVERAGES sign and a window with colorful interior lighting become prominent. The character slows and stops at the front door, with the white van now visible further back in the parking lot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded side passage of a wooden bar into a brightly lit front parking lot at night. It begins by tracking the character along a narrow dirt path illuminated by a wall-mounted light, passing wooden barrels and glowing side windows. As the character rounds the corner, the scene opens into a wide lot where the dimness shifts to the vibrant red glow of a neon beer sign and the painted facade of the Double Barrel Bar. The camera then glides past parked vehicles, including a dark muscle car and a white van, as the colorful lighting of the cold beverages sign becomes prominent. Finally, the movement slows and comes to a halt as the character reaches the front entrance door under the distant twinkle of city lights.
